app.title: EDPB Breach Notification Assistant
app.subtitle: Offline, privacy-by-design tool for personal data breach triage, ENISA severity scoring and EDPB notification preparation
app.disclaimer: Draft based on the EDPB template v1.0 (public consultation until 5 August 2026). Runs entirely in your browser - no data leaves your device. Not an official submission channel; do not use for live notifications to a supervisory authority until authorities implement the template.
lang.label: Language
pre.title: Pre-assessment (triage)
pre.intro: Quick triage, inspired by the ICO self-assessment, to decide whether this is a notifiable personal data breach before completing the full template.
pre.q_isbreach: Is this a breach of security leading to accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorised disclosure of, or access to personal data?
pre.q_personaldata: Does the breach involve personal data (information relating to an identified or identifiable person)?
pre.q_risk: Is the breach likely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of individuals?
pre.q_highrisk: Is the breach likely to result in a HIGH risk to individuals?
pre.verdict.notbreach: This does not appear to be a personal data breach under the GDPR. Keep an internal record anyway.
pre.verdict.norisk: Personal data breach with no likely risk: notification to the supervisory authority may not be required, but you must record it (Art. 33(5)).
pre.verdict.notify_dpa: Likely notifiable to the supervisory authority within 72 hours (Art. 33).
pre.verdict.notify_subjects: High risk: also communicate to the affected individuals without undue delay (Art. 34), unless an Art. 34(3) exemption applies.
enisa.title: ENISA severity assessment
enisa.intro: Computes SE = DPC x EI + CB and the severity band. A reproducible score to answer the template field 'describe the methodology used'.
enisa.trigger_off: SE < 2 (Low): notification to the authority is generally not required, but record the breach.
enisa.prefill: Use this score to pre-fill the EDPB notification
form.title: EDPB notification
form.intro: The full EDPB template, prepopulated from your pre-assessment and ENISA score. Conditional fields appear based on your answers.
form.export_note: The exported JSON validates against the open breach-notification schema and can be submitted via the open API by your management system.
record.title: Breach record (accountability)
record.intro: A register of ALL breaches, including non-notifiable ones, inspired by the Canadian PIPEDA record-keeping obligation and GDPR Art. 33(5). Stored locally in your browser.
